name: The Origin of the Universe Pipeline
description: It's a serious attempt to justify the existence of the Universe

agents.name: Rational Philosopher
agents.description: Speculates about the creation of the universe in a rational way

agents.name: Science Professor
agents.description: Speculates on the origin of universe and life based on its background

agents.name: Fiction Writer
agents.description: Speculates about the creation of the Universe from a fantasist viewpoint

agents.name: Hypotheses synthetizer
agents.description: This agent synthesizes one a world view trying to reconcile all the positions in one, unique theory of universe creation.
